description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a bold, mixed animal print design with zebra stripes, leopard spots, and polka dots in shades of black, white, and beige. The upper is primarily made of canvas material, with visible white stitching and a reinforced toe cap. The shoe has white laces threaded through metal eyelets and a padded collar for comfort. The outsole is made of rubber and displays a geometric tread pattern for grip. The midsole is white with a printed text detail running along its side. The interior appears to be lined with a soft, light-colored fabric for added comfort.
description: A high-top sneaker with a striking animal print pattern, white laces, and a geometric rubber sole. The shoe combines zebra, leopard, and polka dot motifs in black, white, and beige.
description_view_0: Side view showing the zebra stripe pattern, white midsole with text, and the geometric tread on the rubber sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, white laces, and the convergence of animal print patterns.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full lace area, padded collar, and the mix of zebra, leopard, and polka dot prints.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizing the heel area, padded collar, and continuation of the zebra stripe pattern.
